title: coronilla compressa
intro: Coronilla compressa, also known as the dwarf or bush clover, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Coronilla compressa are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Coronilla compressa can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
